HomePage.title: PoE2 Marketplace
HomePage.tagline: Buy and sell Path of Exile 2 services safely — escrow-protected.
HomePage.heroTitle: Path of Exile 2 services — bought safely
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Escrow-protected orders, verified sellers, a flat 15% fee. Pay only when you confirm delivery.
HomePage.categoriesSubtitle: Currency, carries, power leveling, crafting and coaching — from sellers who know the game.
HomePage.howSubtitle: Your payment is held safely until you confirm the work is done.
HomePage.step1Desc: Pick a service and pay into escrow.
HomePage.step2Desc: We hold the funds — the seller can't be paid yet.
HomePage.step3Desc: Track progress and chat inside the order.
HomePage.step4Desc: Release the funds when you're happy — or open a dispute.
HomePage.featuredEmpty: Fresh listings are on the way.
HomePage.sellerBandTitle: Turn your PoE2 mastery into income
HomePage.sellerBandSubtitle: List your services and get paid safely through escrow.
HomePage.guardSubtitle: Every order is protected end to end.
HomePage.guardEscrowDesc: Your payment is held safely and only released when you confirm the work is done.
HomePage.guardMoneyDesc: Not delivered as described? Get a full refund through our dispute process.
HomePage.guardVerifiedDesc: Every seller passes ID verification before they can take orders.
HomePage.guardSecureDesc: No bots, no cheats — party-play and trade methods that respect the game.
HomePage.faqQ1: Is it safe to buy here?
HomePage.faqA1: Yes. Payments are held in escrow and only released to the seller after you confirm delivery — or automatically after 72 hours if you're happy. Sellers are ID-verified.
HomePage.faqA2: Most currency and item orders arrive within 15–60 minutes. Boss carries and leveling show an estimated time on each listing.
HomePage.faqA3: Open a dispute from your order. Our moderators review it and issue a refund or release funds fairly.
HomePage.faqA4: No. We use party-play, in-game trade and coaching — no account sharing required.
HomePage.faqA5: PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox. Each listing shows the platform it's for.
HomePage.leagueBody: From fresh-start currency to pinnacle boss carries, our sellers cover the current Path of Exile 2 league end to end — Atlas progression, Trials of Ascendancy, crafting and more.
HomePage.expertText: Tell us your goal and we'll point you to the fastest, safest route — tailored to your build and schedule.

Footer.tagline: The specialist marketplace for Path of Exile 2.
